Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Reviewing Large Changes with Jujutsu 77 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Human Organ Atlas 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Why Are Viral Capsids Icosahedral? 60 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. Skillfile, the declarative skill manager, now with search for 110K+ skills 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance 925 upvotes, 290 comments
  6. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant 135 upvotes, 39 comments
  7. MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security 363 upvotes, 124 comments
  8. Stop Sloppypasta 562 upvotes, 221 comments
  9. Chrome DevTools MCP (2025) 549 upvotes, 217 comments
  10. Six ingenious ways how Canon DSLRs used to illuminate their autofocus points 104 upvotes, 33 comments
  11. The 49MB web page 738 upvotes, 321 comments
  12. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 461 upvotes, 203 comments
  13. Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance 51 upvotes, 16 comments
  14. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 65 upvotes, 22 comments
  15. Home Assistant waters my plants 178 upvotes, 77 comments
  16. Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  17. I Love FreeBSD 141 upvotes, 64 comments
  18. Autoresearch Hub 58 upvotes, 22 comments
  19. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 805 upvotes, 477 comments
  20. Even Faster Asin() Was Staring Right at Me 58 upvotes, 27 comments
  21. 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images 95 upvotes, 52 comments
  22. US Job Market Visualizer – Andrej Karpathy 127 upvotes, 77 comments
  23. Obsession with growth is destroying nature, 150 countries warn 182 upvotes, 126 comments
  24. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 12 upvotes, 4 comments
  25. How I write software with LLMs 405 upvotes, 378 comments
  26. Show HN: Hackerbrief – Top posts on Hacker News summarized daily 47 upvotes, 35 comments
  27. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 17 upvotes, 10 comments
  28. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 14 upvotes, 8 comments
  29. MCP Server Is Eating Your Context Window. There's a Simpler Way 46 upvotes, 49 comments
  30. Nango (YC W23, API Access for Agents and Apps) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
